MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Equity Residential Properties Management, is present. Represented by
Attorney, Alan Horwitz, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Robert Lemley, is present.
Attorney, Hope L. Greenhill, representing the defendant through limited scope.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in room 305b.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-25-2010 is vacated.
